maxyNotes.title: Released to the alliance
maxyNotes.body: Released to the alliance and metal visitors who are still over, any questions let me know. Rift wall break calculator is my current focus so there is no more guessing, will expand on it down the line so it can also calculate your losses in the cy. Currently just in the leaders corner tools.

maxyNotes.title: Planned
maxyNotes.body: Planned — Boss specific guides + tool usage, PvP attacking guide + tooling, in-depth Defence guide. Locked-off section for leaders only at the moment, contains a few tools I don't want leaked at this time — so PM me for a code and I might say yes.

maxyNotes.title: Work in progress
maxyNotes.body: Links only shared to Chemies members. Send me a PM in-game / DM if you want anything specific added, want more images, or want to contribute a guide or calculator of your own. Cheers, Maxy

changelog.title: Item Value Finder — icons & cleaner names
changelog.body: Every reward now shows a small in-game icon (troops, tools, equipment, decorations, construction items, tokens & currencies), construction-item and gem names are fixed, and each deal is labelled with a clean vendor (Hall of Legends, Nomad shop, Rift Raid shop…) instead of dev labels.

changelog.title: Rift Courtyard Calculator
changelog.body: New calculator: will your courtyard hit clear the rift boss's CY, and what will it cost? Pick a boss & level, set your wave once and toggle your pre-battle tools — calibrated against real Fungal L10–L12 battle reports (±13% on losses).

changelog.title: Six new tools + a tidier Calculators page
changelog.body: Added the Buildings overview, Building Upgrade Cost & Time, Recruitment Speed Caps, Equipment Set-Bonus Finder, a native Hall of Legends Planner and a device-local Timer Board. The three Rift calculators now lead the Calculators page under Feature Calculators.

changelog.title: Rift Wall-Break Simulator — calibrated
changelog.body: The wall-break sim is now tuned against two full Level 11 boss reports — breach waves land exactly and losses within a few percent. Kills now accelerate as a wall thins, the front takes both rams and ladders, gear reduction splits into gate and wall, and unit stats read straight off the Troops overview by level. No more guessing.

changelog.title: Misc Tools — Fortress & Name Changes now public
changelog.body: Fortress Tracker (live cooldowns, last attacker, your personal 72h timer) and Name Changes (catch the renamers) moved out of the gated area into a new Misc Tools section — open to everyone.

changelog.title: References & community sheets
changelog.body: New: Maximise Recruitment guide, Courtyard Limits and Name Change Pricing references, plus hosted community sheets (CI costs, WoA 2024 odds).

changelog.title: All overviews complete
changelog.body: Four new overviews: Troops & Tools (461 units + 255 tools with real stats), Generals (full ability kits), Loot Boxes (46 boxes with real drop chances) and Event Rewards (milestone tracks for 20 events).

changelog.title: Auto-updating data
changelog.body: All tool data now refreshes automatically every day — and after game maintenances — straight from the community data cache.

changelog.title: Smarter Rift optimizer
changelog.body: The Rift Commander Maker now builds the strongest loadout by weighted combat value — range/melee/courtyard attack first, then unit limit, then strength — and shows the combat totals. Rift-only sets (no PvP/castellan).

changelog.title: Accurate event art
changelog.body: Every event in the homepage plan now uses the in-game icon. Fixed missing Victorious hero images in the Equipment Overview.

changelog.title: Guides
changelog.body: New Guides section — start with Getting Started, Combat Basics, Attack Commander Setup and Rift Raid Basics. Searchable like any tool.

changelog.title: Events plan with real art
changelog.body: The homepage events row now uses in-game event art, and the whole feed (news, changelog, events) updates from one data file.

changelog.title: Rift Raid Bosses
changelog.body: All 3 bosses, 20 levels each, with per-stage wall garrisons and boss effects. Rift Commander Maker now shows real piece art and exact gem names.

changelog.title: Equipment Overview
changelog.body: 617 gear pieces with full effect lists and real art, including Hero-slot commander portraits. Gacha Sim drops link straight here.

changelog.title: Decorations Overview
changelog.body: 532 decorations with images. Default sort is Decoration Points.

changelog.title: Gacha Spin Simulator
changelog.body: Real drop rates across 5 game versions, with pulls-to-get targeting.

changelog.title: Attack Speed & Detection
changelog.body: Travel time, horse boosts and the exact detection window.

news.title: The News Hub is finally here!
Unite or Fall A Dead World Seeks Another
